Hair: Light brunette, layered braids cascading down shoulders.
Clothing: Bodycon dress - teal.
Pose: Leaning casually against a wall, one hip slightly out, relaxed posture.
Emotions: Uplifting Hope - serene, radiant, gently smiling.
Environment: Sunny noon in a sunroom - warm light flooding through glass walls, soft shadows on tiled floor.
Style: phtorealistic Realistic photo. Composed, photographed and rendered to perfection.incredibly lifelike
